text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While walking around the central<n>plaza, I spot
Mejiro Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...All right. My shoes are on tight and<n>my legs are
all warmed up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Now I just need to wait for Air<n>Groove.

text_block_list.name: Peppy Voice
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Air Groove! You were wonderful<n>in the photo
shoot! Would you like to<n>join us for some tea?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you for your kind offer, but<n>I'm afraid I
have a practice run<n>coming up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student A
text_block_list.text:
You're going to run?! Um, would you<n>mind if we
watched? Just for our own<n>reference!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I only practice in environments<n>where I can
focus completely.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you know if there's an<n>opportunity for you
to come and<n>watch. But this time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove. It's okay... I'm fine with<n>them
watching.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Dober! But you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's fine. I want to check something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So, please, let them watch us.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...All right. Could you head to the track<n>ahead of
us? I'll be right there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe we get to see a race<n>between the
school's best! Let's go<n>grab good seats!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not going to go easy on you,<n>Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Good. I'm not planning on holding<n>anything back
either.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Big talk. I'm excited to see<n>whether you can
back it up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student A
text_block_list.text:
And they're off! Holy smokes!<n>They're already
running that fast?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student B
text_block_list.text:
Such incredible speed... Neither one's<n>giving up
their lead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (I won't... lose! In fact, I'm barely<n>getting started!)

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Go, Air Groove, go! You've got this,<n>Doberrrr!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hah... No matter how huge theobstacle! I will... overcome it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... I lost by...seven lengths.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Dang it. There are still... some<n>hurdles... I can't
clear.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No, that big talk was more than just<n>hot air. You
had me in a panic for a<n>moment back there.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...So, were you able to check what<n>you wanted to?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm still no match for you. I go too<n>hard and end up
exhausting myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: This frustration is proof that I'm<n>making progress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. Dober, you really have changed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Seems that way!
